user.title: Konfigūruoti SolaX Developer API
user.description: Įveskite Developer API prisijungimo duomenis ir apklausos parinktis.

data_description.client_id: Client ID from your SolaX Developer Portal application.
data_description.client_secret: Client Secret from the same Developer Portal application.

reauth_confirm.title: Iš naujo prijungti SolaX Developer API
reauth_confirm.description: Autentifikacija nepavyko. Įveskite galiojančius Developer API prisijungimo duomenis, kad integracija vėl prisijungtų.

data_description.client_id: Client ID for the existing SolaX Developer API application.
data_description.client_secret: Current Client Secret for the application.

reconfigure.title: Perkonfigūruoti SolaX Developer API
reconfigure.description: Atnaujinkite prisijungimo duomenis, API regioną arba Home Assistant sistemos pavadinimą.

data_description.client_id: Client ID to use after reconfiguration.
data_description.client_secret: Client Secret to use after reconfiguration.

abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to SolaX Developer API
abort.cannot_read_data: Credentials are valid but no readable plant data was returned
abort.reauth_successful: SolaX Developer API was reconnected successfully
abort.reconfigure_successful: SolaX Developer API was reconfigured successfully

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to SolaX Developer API
error.cannot_read_data: Credentials are valid but no readable plant data was returned

credentials.title: Prisijungimo duomenys & System
credentials.description: Update the Developer API account, region, and Home Assistant system name.

data_description.client_id: Client ID from your SolaX Developer Portal application.
data_description.client_secret: Client Secret from the same Developer Portal application.

polling.title: Apklausa & Live View
polling.description: Konfigūruokite standartinę apklausą, laikiną Live View apklausą ir naktinį profilį.

data_description.live_view_default_duration: How long Live View remains active when no duration override is supplied.
data_description.live_view_interval: Requested Live View polling interval. The effective interval may be increased to protect the API budget.
data_description.live_view_call_budget_per_minute: Maximum API calls per minute reserved for Live View.
data_description.night_scan_interval: Polling interval used during the configured night period.
data_description.night_start_hour: Local hour when night polling starts.
data_description.night_end_hour: Local hour when night polling ends.

manual_devices.title: Rankinis įrenginiai
manual_devices.description: Pridėkite įrenginius, kuriuos paskyra gali nuskaityti, bet inventoriaus endpointai jų negrąžina. Kiekvienas įrenginys patikrinamas prieš išsaugant.

data.manual_meter_serials_add: Add Manual Meter Serials (one per line, optional |businessType)
data.manual_ems_systems_add: Add Manual EMS Systems (EMS serial|plant ID, one per line)

data_description.manual_meter_serials_add: Enter one accessible meter serial per line. Add |1 or |4 only when a business type must be forced.
data_description.manual_ems_systems_add: Enter one EMS serial and plant ID per line as SERIAL|PLANT_ID.

advanced.title: Išplėstiniai & diagnostika
advanced.description: Configure diagnostic notifications and advanced integration behavior.

data_description.rate_limit_notifications: Show Home Assistant notifications when SolaX reports a rate or quota limit.
data_description.ev_charger_controls_enabled: Allow real write requests for EV charger control services only. When disabled, EV charger services stay dry-run blocked like the other control services.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to SolaX Developer API
error.cannot_read_data: Credentials are valid but no readable plant data was returned
error.invalid_manual_meter_serials: Invalid manual meter serial format. Use one serial per line, optionally SERIAL|1 or SERIAL|4.
error.manual_meter_serial_validation_failed: Manual meter serial validation failed. Meter realtime data could not be verified.
error.manual_meter_serial_validation_unavailab: Manual meter validation is unavailable until the integration is fully loaded.
error.manual_meter_remove_target_required: Select a manual meter before using remove.
error.manual_meter_remove_target_missing: Selected manual meter was not found in current settings.
error.invalid_manual_ems_systems: Invalid manual EMS format. Use one EMS serial and plant ID per line: SERIAL|PLANT_ID.
error.manual_ems_validation_failed: Manual EMS validation failed. The EMS attribute endpoint did not verify this serial and plant.
error.manual_ems_validation_unavailable: Manual EMS validation is unavailable until the integration is fully loaded.
error.manual_ems_remove_target_required: Select a manual EMS system before using remove.
error.manual_ems_remove_target_missing: Selected manual EMS system was not found in current settings.

api_rate_limit.title: SolaX Developer API rate limit is active
api_rate_limit.description: SolaX rejected calls because a rate or quota limit is active. Affected areas: {contexts}. Reduce polling or Live View use and allow the limit to recover.

api_permission.title: SolaX Developer API access is incomplete
api_permission.description: SolaX denied access to one or more read endpoints. Affected areas: {contexts}. Verify the client permissions and authorized plants in the SolaX Developer Portal.

manual_refresh.name: Rankinis Atnaujinimas
manual_refresh.description: Trigger an immediate refresh for all configured SolaX Developer API entries.

entry_id.name: Įrašo ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id; if omitted, all entries are refreshed.

start_live_view.name: Pradėti Live View
start_live_view.description: Enable temporary realtime-focused polling with an automatic timeout.

interval_seconds.name: Tikslinis intervalas (sekundėmis)
interval_seconds.description: Optional live mode target interval override.

stop_live_view.name: Stabdyti Live View
stop_live_view.description: Disable live polling and return to standard/night profile timing.

list_history_devices.name: List History Devices
list_history_devices.description: List currently discovered devices that can be queried by the Developer API history endpoint. Does not call the SolaX API.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id. If omitted, all loaded entries are included.

list_plant_statistics_targets.name: List Plant Statistics Targets
list_plant_statistics_targets.description: List currently discovered plants that can be queried by the Developer API plant statistics endpoint. Does not call the SolaX API.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id. If omitted, all loaded entries are included.

fetch_device_history.name: Gauti Device Istorija
fetch_device_history.description: Read historical telemetry from the Developer API and cache the result. Long time ranges are automatically split into API-safe windows.

sn_list.name: Įrenginių serijos numerių sąrašas
sn_list.description: Device SN list, min 1 max 200. Requests are chunked automatically.

request_sn_type.name: Request SN tipas
request_sn_type.description: Optional battery query mode (1 inverter SN / 2 battery SN).

fetch_plant_year_statistics.name: Fetch Plant Year Statistics
fetch_plant_year_statistics.description: Read monthly plant statistics for one year from the Developer API. Display-only; does not write to Home Assistant Recorder.

year.name: Year
year.description: Calendar year to fetch. Current year fetches year-to-date; previous years fetch all 12 months.

fetch_plant_month_statistics.name: Fetch Plant Month Statistics
fetch_plant_month_statistics.description: Read daily plant statistics for one month from the Developer API. Display-only; does not write to Home Assistant Recorder.

month.name: Month
month.description: Calendar month to fetch, 1-12. Future months in the current year are rejected.

query_request_result.name: Užklausti Request Rezultatas
query_request_result.description: Query asynchronous command request status by string requestId.

request_id.name: Request ID
request_id.description: Request ID returned by a control API call. String and numeric inputs are accepted.

query_master_control_device.name: Užklausti Master Valdymas Device
query_master_control_device.description: Read the top-level master control device (C&I only, businessType=4).

set_export_control.name: Set Export Valdymas (Dry-Run)
set_export_control.description: Tik Dry-Run. Patikrina payload ir blokuoja rašymą.

sn_list.name: Įrenginių serijos numerių sąrašas
sn_list.description: Required. Device SN list. Runtime validation allows 1 to 10 serials.

device_type.name: Įrenginio tipas
device_type.description: Required. Developer API device type, for example 1 inverter.

is_enable.name: Įjungimo žyma
is_enable.description: Privaloma. Sveikojo skaičiaus payload laukas Dry-Run validacijai.

limit_value.name: Limito reikšmė
limit_value.description: Required. Export limit in kW; decimal values with up to two places are supported.

charge_current.name: Charge Srovė
charge_current.description: Privaloma. Sveikojo skaičiaus payload laukas Dry-Run validacijai.

set_evc_current_limit.name: EV Charger Current Limit
set_evc_current_limit.description: Executes a real EV charger command when EV charger controls are enabled. Otherwise validates the payload and blocks it as a dry-run.

sn_list.name: Įrenginių serijos numerių sąrašas
sn_list.description: Required. Device SN list. Runtime validation allows 1 to 10 serials.

current_limit.name: Srovė Limitas
current_limit.description: Privaloma. Sveikojo skaičiaus payload laukas Dry-Run validacijai.

set_battery_heating.name: Battery Heating Settings (Dry-Run)
set_battery_heating.description: Tik Dry-Run. Patikrina battery heating settings ir blokuoja rašymą.

sn_list.name: Įrenginių serijos numerių sąrašas
sn_list.description: Required. Device SN list, minimum 1 and maximum 10.

heating_enable.name: Heating Įjungti
heating_enable.description: Required. 0 disables battery heating; 1 enables it.

heating_level.name: Heating Level
heating_level.description: Required when enabled. Supported values are 0, 1, and 2.

heating_period1_start_time.name: Heating Period 1 Pradėti
heating_period1_start_time.description: Required when enabled. HH:MM time value.

heating_period1_end_time.name: Heating Period 1 End
heating_period1_end_time.description: Required when enabled and must be later than period 1 start.

heating_period2_start_time.name: Heating Period 2 Pradėti
heating_period2_start_time.description: Optional second heating period start. HH:MM time value.

heating_period2_end_time.name: Heating Period 2 End
heating_period2_end_time.description: Required when period 2 start is supplied.

set_ems_manual_mode.name: EMS Rankinis Režimas (Dry-Run)
set_ems_manual_mode.description: Tik Dry-Run. Patikrina EMS manual-mode settings ir blokuoja rašymą.

device_type.name: Įrenginio tipas
device_type.description: Required. Fixed value 100 for EMS System.

business_type.name: Business tipas
business_type.description: Required. Fixed value 4 for commercial & industrial EMS systems.

param_list.name: EMS Parameters
param_list.description: Required. List of 1 to 10 EMS objects with registerNo, manualMode, and conditional power/targetSoc.

list_alarm_targets.name: List Alarm Targets
list_alarm_targets.description: List currently discovered plants and devices that can be queried by the Developer API alarm endpoint. Does not call the SolaX API.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id. If omitted, all loaded entries are included.

fetch_alarm_information.name: Fetch Alarm Information
fetch_alarm_information.description: Read paged alarm information from the Developer API. Display-only; does not write to Home Assistant Recorder.

plant_id.name: Plant ID
plant_id.description: Optional plant ID returned by list_alarm_targets. If omitted, all loaded plants are queried.

business_type.name: Business Type
business_type.description: Optional business type for explicit plant queries. 1 residential, 4 commercial & industrial.

alarm_state.name: Alarm State
alarm_state.description: Alarm state filter. Use all, ongoing, closed, 1, or 0.

max_pages.name: Maximum Pages
max_pages.description: Maximum pages to fetch per plant and alarm state, 1-100.

no_configured_entries.message: No configured SolaX Developer API entries

history_end_before_start.message: end_time must be greater than start_time

control_field_name_invalid.message: {service}: service fields must use snake_case names

control_sn_list_empty.message: {service}: snList must contain at least one serial

control_not_available.message: {service}: no compatible device capability is available in this integration

control_field_number_invalid.message: {service}: field {field} must be a finite number

control_ems_context_invalid.message: {service}: EMS controls require deviceType 100 and businessType 4

control_param_list_length_invalid.message: {service}: paramList must contain 1 to {max} EMS systems

control_param_list_item_invalid.message: {service}: paramList item {index} must be an object
